ham.subject: Out of Office: Alex Martinez
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your email. I will be out of the office from Monday, April 22nd to Friday, April 26th, returning on Monday, April 29th. During this period I will have limited access to email.

For urgent matters, please contact my colleague Sarah Lee at sarah.lee@example.com or call the office line at (555) 123-4567.

Best regards,
Alex Martinez
Senior Analyst
Example Corp

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Gift Card Processing Required
spam.body:
Dear Team,

I hope this message finds you well. Our finance department has urgently requested that you process a corporate gift card for a key client within the next 24 hours. Please confirm receipt of this email and provide the card details as soon as possible.

Thank you for your swift action.

Best,
John Doe
Chief Executive Officer
Example Corp
